## Checklist

- [ ] `nix flake check` passes (build, tests, clippy, rustfmt, nixfmt, actionlint)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (compiler **and** executor paths where relevant)
- [ ] `README.md` updated if the public interface or behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under "Unreleased"
